title: Naruto Destination
description:
The Naruto Destination branch and rework of the well known Mathioks Naruto Anime Mod.

Multiplayer focused with a lot of changes!
body:
![Naruto Destination Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/648450f0c92509236368de448c55a217c88be3ff.png)

# The Naruto Destination Mod lets you play as any kind of Shinobi in the Naruto-Verse that you can imagine.


- **Level Up to increase your fighting prowess**
- **Improve uncapped stats like: Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Genjutsu, Summoning etc.**
- **Unlock hundreds of different jutsus for your personal build**
- **A bunch of different modes like Tenseigan Chakra Mode, Curse Seal, Sage and so on**
- **Gain your own Tailed Beast to become a Jinchuriki**
- **All of the Dojutsus (eyes) from the anime**


    

**This is the Naruto Destination branch of the well known Naruto Anime Mod made by Mathioks!**

**Please join his [Discord](https://discord.gg/gG5zDan8vK) and check out his [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@Mathioks) channel!**

**This branch was created with his permission and here are our changes to the original:**

![Naruto Destination Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d317164d42e165448953e83850719655f74bc551.png)

**Please check out our [Discord](https://discord.gg/jtJ2VdN3D2) and chat with us about improvements and suggestions!**
